title: Block break challenge
description: Every time you break a block it lowers your maximum health by half a heart! Try to beat the game or just have some fun but if you want to try again do /reset to get back to 20 hearts!
body: Every time you break a block it lowers your maximum health by half a heart! Try to beat the game or just have some fun but if you want to try again do /reset to get back to 20 hearts!
